task_completion.description: Open the approved drawing specification file to find the correct dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or document viewer showing the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/channel_approved_drawing.txt.

task_completion.description: Open the draft channel file in SolveSpace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace application window is open, displaying a 2D/3D sketch of a channel section, with the window title or property browser indicating 'channel_draft.slvs'.

task_completion.description: Update the erroneous dimensional constraints to match the approved drawing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace property browser or sketch view showing the updated dimension values (83.0, 18.0, 47.0) applied to the channel section sketch.

task_completion.description: Ensure the initially correct dimensions remain unchanged.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace sketch view or property browser showing the preserved dimension values (100.0, 80.0) alongside the corrected ones.

task_completion.description: Save the modified CAD file with the new name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the path /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/channel_corrected.slvs, the SolveSpace window title updated to 'channel_corrected.slvs', or a file manager showing the newly created file.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace graphical interface to edit the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application being used to modify constraints, rather than a terminal or text editor editing the .slvs file directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with the constraint properties in SolveSpace.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the property browser or text input dialogs within SolveSpace being used to enter the new values.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the CAD software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows, if open, do not contain commands (like sed, awk, or cp) directly modifying or copying the .slvs files to spoof the output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/channel_draft.slvs. Target file: /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/channel_corrected.slvs. Spec file: /home/ga/Desktop/channel_approved_drawing.txt. The draft file contains incorrect constraints (65.0, 25.0, 32.0) which must be updated to (83.0, 18.0, 47.0). The draft file also contains correct constraints (100.0, 80.0) which must be preserved. Tolerance for all constraints is 0.5mm.
